name: dev-motivation
description: Occasionally reward meaningful development milestones with curated motivation images.

interface.shortDescription: Motivation images after meaningful dev milestones.
interface.longDescription: Dev Motivation lets users curate SFW X/Twitter post image URLs and lets Codex occasionally embed one after major progress, important PRs, substantial pushes, or difficult focused work.
defaultPrompt: Use a motivation break after this hard task.
